title: Graph-first per-session stats
description: graphify-out/.graph_first_stats.json — append-only ring (~50 records) of the graph-first extension's per-session escalation counters. Derived/machine-local (under gitignored graphify-out/), optional. Malleable: extra fields allowed so extensions/graph-first.ts can grow the record without breaking validation. audit-pipelines.py:check_graph_first_drift() WARNs when the bypass ratio stays high.
